personal.name: Dakota Radigan
personal.title: Senior Product Manager
personal.summary: Senior Product Manager with 5+ years shipping data-driven investment solutions and managing technical partnerships. Expert in validating client and operational pain points and translating them into functional specifications that drive measurable business impact. Combining deep investment operations knowledge with technical fluency (SQL, Python, AI) and a bias for action.

experience.description: Leading product strategy and technical partnerships for investment solutions at a leading direct indexing firm.
achievements: Led technical investment integration with Wells Fargo, aligning internal/external engineering teams to deliver pilot 2 weeks early—securing $32M initial AUM and a $3B+ pipeline
Launched a new investment product MVP ahead of schedule; validated market needs and iterated rapidly to capture $75M AUM within 6 months of release
Built a RAG-based GenAI from PoC to internal production — projected to autonomously resolve ~2,500+ annual email inquiries and slash response times for clients from ~2 hours to minutes
Shipped a high-impact feature reducing manual client touchpoints on ~75k accounts

Built a Tableau analytics dashboard for leadership to monitor feature utilization and identify friction points, driving data-backed roadmap prioritization and establishing metrics adopted across team OKRs

Appointed firm-wide 'AI Champion,' leading an 8-person task force to drive strategy. Increased Copilot adoption by 60% in 2 months and secured budget for dedicated engineering to scale custom OpenAI API solutions

experience.description: Drove product innovation and cross-functional alignment for investment platform features.
achievements: Awarded firm-wide 'Commitment to Excellence' for leading a scalability initiative that saved 2,500+ operational hours annually through workflow design and feature enhancements
Partnered with Sales on $200M+ in enterprise deals, acting as the technical SME to translate complex client requirements into executable engineering specifications and ops workflows
Chaired a cross-functional leadership council (Engineering, Ops, Sales) to break down silos and align priorities, reducing decision cycle times for critical execution items from weeks to days
Prototyped a Python-based self-service tool for the C-suite, demonstrating the viability of ongoing digital service concepts

experience.description: Scaled direct indexing product suite and led platform configuration for new investment strategies.
achievements: Scaled the direct indexing suite by launching 18 new benchmark strategies within 9 months, leading platform configuration to drive $100M+ in new AUM
Wrote functional specifications for a digital onboarding portal
Engineered SQL reporting and heatmaps to diagnose bottlenecks and drive targeted CRM optimizations across Sales, Client Service, and operations

experience.description: Led account onboarding team and collaborated with engineering to build internal tools.
achievements: Led a team of 11 directly overseeing the strategic onboarding of $493M in assets (1,200 accounts), optimizing daily operations to improve onboarding times by 4 hours
Direct dotted line into Engineering as a QA Lead, launching two internal workflow tools that digitized manual tasks and significantly improved process reliability
Built SQL-based rule systems and Excel models to validate complex logic prior to implementation, reducing errors and providing onboarding metrics

projects.name: Resume Assistant: AI-Powered Professional Portfolio
projects.tagline: Interactive chatbot reimagining how recruiters discover talent through conversational AI
projects.description: Built an AI-powered chatbot that transforms the traditional resume into an interactive conversation. Recruiters can ask natural language questions ('What's your AI experience?') and receive contextual answers powered by RAG architecture. The portfolio piece itself demonstrates the technical capabilities it showcases—proving AI/ML expertise through a working AI product.
highlights: Reimagined professional discovery: shifted from passive document to interactive conversation
Implemented full RAG pipeline with semantic search, intelligent chunking, and context retrieval
Built production-ready guardrails: rate limiting, session management, hallucination prevention (temperature=0.1)
Designed warm green/sage UI with dark mode, WCAG AA accessibility, and custom CSS design system
Created dual-purpose innovation: functional recruiter tool + technical showcase of AI/ML capabilities
Engineered for scale: concurrent session support, pluggable state management, security layers
projects.problem_solved: Traditional resumes are static, one-size-fits-all documents that force recruiters to linearly parse dense text, often missing relevant details. For candidates with diverse technical backgrounds, the best-fit information gets overlooked in seconds-long skims.
projects.impact: Transforms resume experience from passive reading to interactive discovery. Demonstrates forward-thinking product development and provides working proof of AI/ML engineering expertise. Creates memorable differentiation and interview conversation starters.
projects.context: Personal portfolio project deployed as public-facing chatbot accessible from LinkedIn profile

architecture_details.frontend: JavaScript with custom CSS design system, markdown rendering, theme toggle, responsive layout
architecture_details.backend: FastAPI with session management, rate limiting, input validation, timeout protection
architecture_details.ai_orchestration: Claude Opus 4.5, RAG Pipeline (Qdrant + OpenAI embeddings), semantic search with score threshold
architecture_details.data_layer: Vector Store (Qdrant) with semantic chunking + metadata tagging for intelligent retrieval
core_capabilities: Semantic Search - retrieves relevant resume context based on natural language queries
Session Management - UUID-based tracking with auto-compaction and cleanup
Hallucination Prevention - temperature=0.1 ensures factual accuracy, no fabricated credentials
Security Guardrails - prompt injection protection, rate limiting (20 req/min), input validation
Interactive Discovery - conversational interface replacing static document parsing
Production Engineering - scalable architecture with pluggable state, environment-aware config

projects.name: Ben AI: Intelligent Benchmark Assistant
projects.tagline: Full-stack AI chatbot: Personal PoC to production deployment reducing advisor research time from hours to seconds
projects.description: Personal project evolved to production deployment: Built enterprise-grade AI assistant starting as a home PoC (early 2025) to validate RAG architecture for complex financial benchmark queries. After proving technical viability, brought it to Parametric and scaled it to production for advisor workflow automation. Single cohesive project demonstrating end-to-end ownership from initial architecture design through production scaling.
highlights: Phase 1 (Personal PoC): Built initial proof-of-concept at home to validate RAG + hybrid intelligence architecture for complex benchmark eligibility queries
Phase 2 (Production): Brought validated PoC to Parametric, scaled architecture to handle production workload, reducing advisor research time from 30+ minutes to seconds

Designed layered architecture: User Interface → Backend (Request Router, Intent Classification, Session Handler) → AI Orchestration (Function Calling Engine, RAG Pipeline, GPT-4o) → Vector Store + Knowledge Base
Implemented natural language intelligence with intent classification routing and conversation memory
Architected hybrid AI system combining RAG retrieval, LLM reasoning, and deterministic calculations for grounded responses
Built security guardrails including prompt injection protection and input/output sanitization
Achieved tangible business impact: projected to handle 3,500+ annual inquiries autonomously, instant complex query resolution, organic SMAP retention, visible client-facing innovation
Implemented real-time WebSocket communication with automatic REST API fallback for reliability
projects.problem_solved: Financial advisors spent hours researching complex benchmark eligibility requirements (portfolio minimums, ESG criteria, alternatives). Manual research caused workflow disruptions, email chains with 1000s of messages, and delayed client onboarding.
projects.impact: Reduced research time from hours/days to seconds, enabled organic SMAP ecosystem retention, created visible client-facing innovation. Projected to handle 3,500+ annual inquiries autonomously.
projects.context: Personal PoC (early 2025) → Production deployment at Parametric Portfolio (Morgan Stanley)

architecture_details.frontend: Advisor natural language interface with WebSocket/REST communication and typing indicators
architecture_details.backend: FastAPI with Request Router, Intent Classification, Session Handler for context management
architecture_details.ai_orchestration: Function Calling Engine, GPT-4o Model, RAG Pipeline (Pinecone + semantic embeddings)
architecture_details.data_layer: Vector Store (Pinecone) with benchmark embeddings + JSON knowledge base
core_capabilities: Natural Language Intelligence - understands complex queries like 'S&P 500 but more ESG'
Intent Classification Routing - sophisticated routing to appropriate functions
Conversation Memory - smart context retention through intelligent compression
Context-Aware Response Generation - tailored answers based on portfolio size, criteria, intent
Hybrid AI Architecture - RAG + LLM + deterministic logic for accurate, grounded responses
Security Guardrails - prompt injection protection, input sanitization, output validation

projects.name: SQL Analytics Framework

highlights: Engineered SQL reporting and heatmaps to diagnose bottlenecks
Enabled targeted outreach strategy that increased feature utilization by 20%
Directly informed roadmap prioritization with usage data
Monitored KPIs including time-to-onboard and adoption metrics
projects.problem_solved: Lack of visibility into product usage patterns led to misaligned roadmap priorities and low feature adoption
projects.impact: Increased feature utilization by 20%, data-backed roadmap prioritization
